name: Acapulco Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Boneless skinless chicken breast halves
2 tablespoons Minced jalapeno chili with seeds
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a heavy saucepan, boil the chicken broth and pickling spice for ten minutes.
3. Strain the mixture and return the liquid to the saucepan.
4. Add the chicken, onion, vinegar, garlic, oil, and cumin to the pan.
5. Simmer over very low heat until the chicken is cooked through, about ten minutes.
6. Transfer the chicken and onions to a shallow dish.
7. Top with bell peppers and minced chili.
8. Boil the cooking liquid until reduced to 2/3 cup, about ten minutes.
9. Pour the reduced liquid over the chicken and let cool for 30 minutes.
10. Add cilantro to the chicken mixture.
11. Cover and refrigerate until well chilled, turning the chicken occasionally, about 4 hours (can be prepared one day ahead).
12. Slice the chicken and transfer to plates.
13. Top with marinated vegetables and some of the juices.
14. Serve with tortilla chips for dipping.
130 calories per serving
4 g fat
72 mg sodium
44 mg cholesterol
